creator.title: About the Creator
creator.description: The story behind {siteName} and how it came to be

paragraphs.one: My journey into the world of finance began as a fixed-income trader, where I spent years analyzing markets, managing portfolios, and executing trades across various financial instruments. During this time, I developed a deep understanding of financial markets and investment strategies.
paragraphs.two: While I enjoyed the fast-paced environment of trading, I found myself increasingly drawn to technology and software development. The intersection of finance and technology fascinated me, and I decided to pivot my career toward software engineering.
paragraphs.three: Despite changing careers, I remained an active investor, maintaining portfolios across multiple platforms including traditional brokerages and cryptocurrency exchanges. As my investments diversified, I faced a common challenge: keeping track of everything in one place.
paragraphs.four: I found myself juggling between different apps and platforms, manually tracking my overall portfolio performance in spreadsheets. This fragmented approach was time-consuming and prone to errors. I needed a solution that could aggregate all my investment data in one place, providing a comprehensive view of my financial position.
paragraphs.five: That's when the idea for {siteName} was born. I combined my financial expertise with my software engineering skills to create a platform that solves this exact problem. {siteName} connects to multiple investment platforms, aggregates your data, and provides powerful analytics to help you make informed decisions.
paragraphs.six: Today, {siteName} is the tool I wish I had when I started my investment journey. I'm excited to share it with fellow investors who face similar challenges in managing their diversified portfolios.

PrivacyPage.title: Your Security is Our Priority
PrivacyPage.description: {siteName} is built with security and privacy at its core. We ensure your financial data remains protected and private.

authentication.title: Secure Authentication
authentication.description: We use trusted third-party authentication providers like Facebook and Google. We never store or have access to your passwords.

connections.title: Exchange Connections
connections.description: When connecting to trading platforms, we only use official API keys with read-only access. We cannot make trades or withdraw funds on your behalf.

storage.title: Data Storage
storage.description: Your data is encrypted and stored securely. We only collect the necessary information to provide you with portfolio tracking and analytics.

access.title: Limited Access
access.description: Our platform operates on a read-only basis. We can only view the data necessary to display your portfolio information and cannot perform any actions on your accounts.

dataHandling.title: How We Handle Your Data
dataHandling.description: {siteName} is designed to be a secure bridge between your various investment platforms. Here's how we handle your data:

items.one: Authentication is handled through trusted providers (Facebook, Google)
items.two: Exchange connections use read-only API keys
items.three: We never store or have access to your exchange passwords
items.four: Data is encrypted both in transit and at rest
items.five: We only collect data necessary for portfolio tracking
items.six: You can delete your account and data at any time

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.description: Please read these terms carefully before using {siteName}

agreement.title: 1. Agreement to Terms
agreement.description: By accessing or using {siteName}, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you disagree with any part of the terms, you may not access the service.

service.title: 2. Description of Service
service.description: {siteName} is a portfolio tracking platform that allows users to connect multiple investment accounts and view their consolidated performance. We provide this service through:

items.one: Integration with various trading platforms via API connections

items.four: Be responsible for maintaining account security
items.five: Promptly notify us of any security breaches

items.one: We only use official API endpoints provided by the platforms
items.two: API access is limited to read-only operations
items.three: We cannot execute trades or withdraw funds
items.four: You maintain full control over API access and can revoke it at any time

limitations.title: 5. Limitations of Service
limitations.description: {siteName} is for informational purposes only. We do not:

items.two: Guarantee the accuracy of third-party data
items.four: Store or have access to your trading platform credentials

dataUsage.title: 6. Data Usage and Privacy
dataUsage.description: We handle your data in accordance with our Privacy Policy. Key points include:

items.one: Data is encrypted and stored securely
items.two: We only collect necessary information for service operation
items.three: You can request data deletion at any time
items.four: We do not sell or share your personal information

termination.title: 7. Account Termination
termination.description: You may terminate your account at any time. Upon termination:

items.one: All API connections will be removed
items.two: Your data will be deleted from our systems
items.three: You can request a copy of your data before deletion

changes.title: 8. Changes to Terms
changes.description: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of any material changes via email or through the platform.

contact.title: Questions About Our Terms?
contact.description: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at
